bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for each deployed echo clone and modulate alpha to 0.5 in the material or color tint.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/echo_clone_idle_4f_8fps.png during Loading and reuse one atlas for all echo instances.
runtime_notes: Echo clones should share the Umbra proportion family while reading lighter and more static than the player.
Keep the pivot centered so clones can sit cleanly on either scale deck.
Do not animate broad movement; the clone is a placed weight marker, not a second controllable character.

context.usage: Deployable semi-transparent echo that acts as an extra weight source on the scale puzzle and a readable remaining-charge icon reference.

shape.silhouette: A reduced Umbra silhouette with softer edges, smaller eye glow, and a steadier lower body to read as a placed afterimage.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 96x36 px with four 24x36 frames.
The clone reads as a clear subset of the player silhouette while remaining visibly lighter and more spectral.
The lower edge stays visually stable so the clone can be interpreted as a placed weight source on the scale.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
